auth.purpose: Protect the Eltronic Studio admin area and server actions with managed users and roles.

seededAccounts.bootstrapAdmin: Temporary super-admin account with username admin; delete manually after permanent account is tested.
seededAccounts.permanentSuperAdmin: Jake's email account is seeded as a super-admin. Plaintext seeded passwords are never documented or returned.

session.invalidation: Password changes and resets bump sessionVersion for that user.

roles.admin: Full control including user management for now.
roles.moderator: Enquiry moderation and own account only.

selectionOrder.condition: DATABASE_URL, POSTGRES_URL, or a Vercel integration-prefixed variant such as eltronic_db_1_DATABASE_URL is present

storage.smokeTest: npm run storage:check runs scripts/check-storage.mjs after env vars are pulled locally and verifies Neon/Postgres or Redis write/read/delete access.

currentVercelEnvCheck.result: Neon database eltronic_db_1 connected with prefixed environment variables; storage smoke test passed and production deployment dpl_DfWPHsfjnjTYoAuB8zkHqFRzni2j is live

routes.antiSpam: src/lib/contact-captcha.ts local signed maths captcha plus hidden website honeypot

routes.dataSource: static public routes, getProducts(), getProductImages(product), getPublishedProjectCaseStudies()

routes.policy: Allows public site, disallows /studio and /api, points to sitemap.xml

features: Wi-Fi QR payloads for WPA/WPA2, WEP and open networks
square, rounded and circular dot styles

serverActions.effect: Verifies admin credentials, sets session cookie, redirects to /studio.
Creates or updates one product from form data and revalidates managed pages.
Deletes a product by slug and revalidates managed pages.
Applies a status update or delete operation to selected contact submissions, including collapsed duplicate groups.
Creates or updates one Studio user, including role, status and optional password reset.
Deletes one Studio user while preventing removal of the final active admin/super-admin.
Lets the current Studio user update profile fields or change password after current-password verification.
Clears admin session cookie and redirects to login.
Validates public contact form input, verifies signed maths captcha and honeypot, stores a contact submission, redirects to success/error state.

productModel.templateBehavior: Supported product templates are default, hmi, data-logger and module. Studio product forms expose a real selector, and src/lib/managed-data.ts preserves supported values while normalizing unknown values to default. Public product technical data is full-width under Highlights.

galleryImages.behavior: Returns every valid managed product.images entry in order, or product.image as the single fallback. Do not slice or cap by product template. Launch placeholder image assets are filtered from public output. Generated launch illustrations are explicit seed/managed gallery entries for non-Topcon products; Topcon uses CSV-backed manufacturer image URLs.

productModel.primaryImageAssets: public/product-images or trusted source URLs in managed product data

projectCaseStudyModel.publishBehavior: published=true makes the entry appear on /projects, generate /projects/[slug], and appear in /sitemap.xml.

seo.behavior: Public pages have canonical URLs, descriptions, keyword hints, Open Graph/Twitter metadata and JSON-LD where useful. Studio and API routes are excluded from normal crawling.

contactSubmissionModel.antiSpam: src/lib/contact-captcha.ts signs a short-lived math challenge; src/app/contact/actions.ts stores captcha failures and populated website honeypot values as blocked records when storage is available; src/lib/managed-data.ts suppresses rapid duplicate blocked attempts.
contactSubmissionModel.studioPresentation: src/app/studio/(admin)/submissions/page.tsx collapses repeated blocked attempts by fingerprint; src/components/studio/submission-card.tsx and src/app/globals.css render green enquiry, amber captcha and red honeypot markers. Bulk selection uses src/components/studio/submission-bulk-select.tsx and bulkSubmissionAction(). Auto-refresh uses src/components/studio/submissions-auto-refresh.tsx and pauses while checkboxes are selected.
contactSubmissionModel.tester: npm run test:contact-bot runs scripts/test-contact-antispam.mjs against production by default and only exercises rejected bot paths unless -- --valid is passed.
contactSubmissionModel.emailNotification: src/lib/email-notifications.ts can send contact notifications for enquiry, captcha_failed and honeypot_spam records, but notifications are currently paused. Persisted Neon Studio notification setting is mode=off; Vercel CONTACT_NOTIFICATION_FROM, CONTACT_NOTIFICATION_TRANSPORT and CONTACT_NOTIFICATION_HELO_NAME have been removed. Default transport uses the official resend package; optional direct SMTP transport is enabled only with CONTACT_NOTIFICATION_TRANSPORT=direct and resolves recipient MX records from the Vercel function, but Jake reported the direct experiment failed and it should stay disabled. Settings live in managed data and are editable from /studio/settings; admins can set comma-separated recipient emails and the server action validates email shape before saving. Required env vars for Resend: RESEND_API_KEY and CONTACT_NOTIFICATION_FROM. Never hard-code re_ keys in source. Better deliverability requires a verified Eltronic domain and a domain-based sender address. Digest endpoint: /api/contact-notifications/digest. Resend first-email test: npm run email:check -- --send --onboarding. Direct SMTP local test only if intentionally retesting: npm run email:check -- --send --direct.

ui.adminStyle: Tailwind CSS v4 + local shadcn-style primitives

publicAmbientBackground.behavior: Public-only fixed ambient layer with low-opacity floating syntax glyphs. Respects prefers-reduced-motion; no cursor or pointer-follow glow.

homeHeroTypewriter.behavior: Client-side typewriter role label above the Eltronic homepage hero wordmark. Cycles through short professional role phrases and falls back for prefers-reduced-motion.

publicNavIcons.mobileBehavior: Full desktop nav collapses to a native details hamburger menu under the mobile breakpoint. src/components/site/mobile-nav-auto-close.tsx closes it on link click, outside tap and Escape.

publicFooter.behavior: Simple static public footer. Sticky/reveal behavior was removed after causing the footer to appear behind page content.

publicWorkflowCopy.tone: Professional delivery for complex systems, presented as controlled, clear and easy for customers to move through. Public copy should position Eltronic as a practical prototyping, technical systems, electronics, software, product and integration partner. Product catalogue language should describe products as modules/building blocks Eltronic can sell, adapt or integrate, not the whole company.

productMediaGallery.behavior: Client-side selected image state, thumbnail switching, touch swipe and desktop click-drag switching, keyboard-friendly zoom overlay, previous/next controls. Thumbnail layout scrolls horizontally so product galleries can contain more than four images without changing the hero height.

managedImageRenderer.behavior: Renders normal product image URLs through next/image and inline uploaded image data through a native img element so Studio uploads can display in product cards, admin thumbnails and galleries.

publicTechnicalVisuals.homepageCodeMarkBehavior: Client-side circular < / > hero visual with viewport-wide cursor tracking, inner glyph drift, rotation toward the pointer, breathing magenta/purple glow and gentle scroll parallax. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

ui.studioSidebar: Grouped under Overview, Messages, Content, Tools and Admin with compact link typography. The QR tool link is labelled QR Code Generator. Enquiries badge polling is handled by src/components/studio/studio-submission-notifier.tsx against /api/studio/submissions/summary.
ui.studioTheme: dark/light mode stored in localStorage key eltronic-studio-theme
ui.studioPageHeaderPattern: StudioShell topbar displays the active mode. Admin pages use compact .studio-page-header description/action rows instead of large duplicate page h1 titles.

studioQrCodeGenerator.behavior: Client-only Studio tool for generating URL/text and Wi-Fi QR codes. Wi-Fi mode emits standard mobile WIFI payloads with WPA/WPA2, WEP, open-network and hidden-network options. Exports PNG/SVG locally and does not persist generated codes.

websiteBuilder.behavior: Protected internal Elementor/Colibri-style builder foundation. Controls homepage theme preset, colors, background style, visual density, hero copy/typewriter/CTAs/visual, and section visibility/order/copy. No public admin toolbar.

templateFileEditor.behavior: Protected Code Studio source/template file viewer/editor. Uses a whitelist of src files only. Saves are local-development-only; production/Vercel is read-only. next.config.ts traces src files for this route. Sidebar label is Code Studio under Admin.

studioProductImageManager.behavior: Gallery-style image preview and ordering UI. Image tiles open a modal editor with URL, upload, filename and alt-text controls, and the grid includes a dedicated add-image tile. Uploads are resized in the browser and stored as inline image data in the ordered galleryImagesJson payload with a normalized fileName so Studio does not show raw data URLs. Repeated imageSrc/imageAlt/imageFileName fields are retained as a fallback; first image becomes product.image. There is no intended image-count cap by product template. Product galleries should use managed images from this UI, seed data or generated manifest entries only.

studioProductForm.behavior: Two-column editor with collapsible details/summary sections. Main product fields sit left; publish, commerce and module controls sit in a sticky sidebar on desktop. Saves admin-only SKU, price, tags, module switches and enhanced variant rows without displaying them publicly yet.

removedConsoleExperiment.removedHostRewrite: new.eltronic.co.uk no longer rewrites into this app
removedConsoleExperiment.note: Current production work is focused on the public site and /studio. Do not reintroduce a second CMS or builder unless Jake explicitly asks.
